widgets_values: Describe the expression of the person in detail, within 100 words
Photography. A young woman wearing a black suit, standing in a room

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.
Photography. A young woman wearing a black suit, standing in a room

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

Set it to true = keep the main body image facial expression
Set it to false = keep the face image facial expression

设置为true,保留身体图表情
设置为false,保留面部图表情

Set it to true = keep the main body image facial expression
Set it to false = keep the face image facial expression

设置为true,保留身体图表情
设置为false,保留面部图表情

The higher the F2P lora strength, the more the result looks like the face. But too high it may break the output.

FPLora 权重越高， 脸越像，但是太高图片可能蹦。

Increase the mask grow value here if the masked area is not enough for the face or vise versa.

蒙版区域遮不住的时候提高这个grow值。反之亦然。

The denoise value here, the lower it is the more the result looks like the body image. the higher the value, the more it looks like the face reference image. But too high it may break the output.

denoise 值越低越像身体图，越高就越像脸部图。但是太高图片可能崩。

The prompt matters a lot over the final result.Be careful with it.

提示词很重要，仔细书写。
If you run this workflow locally, you may need to reload this qwen VL node, due to the version mismatch of the node. Right-Click and Reload Node.
If you run this workflow locally, you may need to reload this SeedVR2 (Down)Load DiT Model node, due to the version mismatch of the node. Right-Click and Reload Node.

Diffusion model: Goes to ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models folder
[qwen_image_edit_2509_fp8mixed.safetensors]
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models

GGUF model: Goes to ComfyUI/models/unet folder
[Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF]
https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main

LoRA: Goes to ComfyUI/models/loras folder
[Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors]
https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/tree/main

[Qwen-Image-Edit-F2P]
https://huggingface.co/landon2022/F2P/tree/main

[consistence_edit_v2.safetensors]
https://civitai.com/models/1939453

Text encoder: Goes to ComfyUI/models/text_encoders folder
[qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors]
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors

VAE: Goes to ComfyUI/models/vae folder
[qwen_image_vae.safetensors]
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors
